The '''''Restrainer''''' was an [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

The ''Restrainer'' along with [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Subjugator (Imperial II-class)|''Subjugator'']] ambushed Rebel [[Frigate/Legends|Frigate]] [[Redemption/Legends|''Redemption'']] who received defector [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Zaletta]] from [[DX-11a]]. Forces arriving from [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']] assisted to destroy the Immobilizer and make it to hyperspace.

==Behind the scenes==
A Rebel training mission in the ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]'' game depicts Calamari Cruiser [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']] being trapped by the ''Restrainer'' and subsequently attacked by ISD [[Bellicose (Imperial-class)/Legends|''Bellicose'']] and VSD [[Jundland (Victory-class)|''Jundland'']]. Rebel fighters must destroy the ''Restrainer'' in order for the ''Liberty'' to escape. It is unknown, however, whether this fictional scenario recreates an actual battle between said forces, or when and where it would have taken place.

*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]'' {{1st}} {{C|Simulator appearance only}}
